creator: remko@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

This is very limited information to see what is going on. 
Note that PFsense is a different implementation of FreeBSD 
with some custom patches. The base system is the same though. 

Would you be able to try a recent liveCD/snapshot from FReeBSD 
and see whether the problem persists? We need to get more information 
from you before it's possible to analyze anything at all. 

Thanks for understanding and the willingness to help!
